members.name: John Andrew Balbarosa
members.bio: Computer Science at FEU Tech. Owns the C++ pipeline — parsing, hashing, pattern dispatch, evidence emission. Believes in deterministic structural detection before any AI step. Spends his off-hours on CTF and certification grinds because he likes proof, not vibes.
skills: Trend Micro University CTF — preliminary round participant

highlights.caption: TOPCIT Level 3 passers list — Computer Science track, FEU Tech ACM.
Trend Micro University CTF — preliminary round certificate, Aug 22 2025.
NASA International Space Apps Challenge 2024 — Galactic Problem Solver.
Hack & Yap with the Pizza & Friends Tech Community at Coffee Chapters.
Thesis working session with the research team and adviser.
Thesis title meeting with Collin Andrei Yapchulay and Josephine Santander.

members.name: Miryl de Leon
members.bio: Computer Science at FEU Tech. On the team she keeps the pattern catalog honest and runs the study-design loop — what gets measured, how readers actually behave, where the evidence lives.
